base_prompt_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, anime game portrait, 1girl, solo, detailed eyes, clean line art, soft cel shading, fantasy RPG character illustration
negative_prompt: nsfw, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, cropped head, cut off face, jpeg artifacts, worst quality, low quality, extra person, multiple views, split screen, collage, photorealistic

camera_rules.character_portrait: head and shoulders portrait, front three-quarter view, simple painted background
